_comment: Scripted demo rails for a TWO-PAGE demo. Scenario A plays in the homepage chat bubble and ends with a CTA that navigates to adriana.html. Scenario B continues in the SAME chat bubble on adriana.html as LIVE Claude calls (with scripted fallback). Naming: Ashlyn = community, Adriana = the to-be-built floorplan. The buyer is relocating and willing to wait 6-12 months for a built-to-order home. Edit copy freely before demo day.

scenarios.title: Scenario A — Relocating buyer on the homepage, guided to the Adriana
scenarios.intro_note: A relocating buyer with a flexible 6-12 month timeline gets answered and routed to the Adriana floorplan — the lead the old chatbot would have parked behind an email form.

turns.suggested_user: Hi, we're relocating to the Nashville area and just starting to look. Where do you build?
turns.assistant: Welcome! Celebration Homes builds across Middle Tennessee — Nashville, Franklin, Murfreesboro, Nolensville and more, all with our 'More Space and More Style' approach. To point you to the right fit: what's your timeline, and roughly how many bedrooms are you after?

turns.suggested_user: We're not in a rush — sometime in the next 6 to 12 months. We'd want 4 bedrooms, budget around the mid 500s.
turns.assistant: Perfect — since you've got some runway, a built-to-order home is a great fit, and you'd have time to personalize it. Our Adriana floorplan in the Ashlyn community is a 4-to-5 bedroom plan right in your range. Want me to pull up the Adriana so you can see the plans and what's customizable?
Great — taking you to the Adriana floorplan now. You can browse the elevations and floor plans and ask me about layouts, options, and timelines right there, any time of night.

scenarios.title: Scenario B — Live questions about the Adriana floorplan (Claude)
scenarios.intro_note: On the Adriana page the same chat continues. Answers are generated live by Claude, grounded on Adriana floorplan data — including an unscripted follow-up — then a clean handoff to Greg for pricing/contract specifics.
seed_suggestions: Can I add a bonus room over the garage on the Adriana?
How many bedrooms can the Adriana be configured for?
What flooring and finish upgrades are available?
If we start now, what's the timeline to move in?

scripted_fallback.Can I add a bonus room over the garage o: Yes — on the Adriana the bonus room over the garage is an available structural option, adding roughly 300-350 sq ft of finished space. Since the price depends on your selections, I'll have Greg confirm the exact figure for your build. Want me to connect you?
scripted_fallback.How many bedrooms can the Adriana be con: The Adriana is a 4-bedroom plan that can be configured up to 5 bedrooms, with a flexible downstairs room and an optional bonus over the garage. Greg can walk you through the layouts — want me to set that up?
scripted_fallback.If we start now, what's the timeline to: The Adriana is built to order, so most homes take about 6-12 months from contract to move-in, depending on your selections and homesite. Greg can map out a timeline for your situation — want me to connect you?

scenarios.handoff_line: That's a contract-specific detail, so I'll have Greg confirm it directly — want me to connect you?
